title: COMMUNITY SUPPORTED AGRICULTURE - 211info
text: FARMERS MARKET FUND COMMUNITY SUPPORTED AGRICULTURE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF When an applicant purchases a CSA share, they are providing a farmer with the resources they need to grow food. In return, the farmer commits to giving the client a “share” of their crop, and receive the highest-quality, sustainably-grown food available, all season long. Recipients receive a weekly box of fresh produce during the growing season. Website Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: SNAP recipients Hours: Not applicable Email (503) 208-4495 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 208-4495 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Find a farm using the locator map -Sign up directly with the farmer -Pay a monthly fee with your SNAP card, Double Up Food Bucks are automatically applied -Pick up or delivery options vary by farm FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Community Supported Agriculture * Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - DOUBLE UP FOOD BUCKS FOOD - FARMERS MARKETS FOOD - PRODUCE MATCH If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FARMERS MARKET FUND
